items.promptRaw: アイスバーン上水雪路での走行は自動車の安定性を低下させるため、アクセルを急に踏むと車輪が空転し横滑りを起こしやすい。

items.translatedPrompt: When driving on a narrow mountain road without a center line, what is the appropriate way to pass an oncoming vehicle?
optionsTranslated: A vehicle moving at a slower speed should go first.
A fully-loaded cargo vehicle should yield to an empty vehicle and let it go first.
The vehicle on the side closer to the mountain should go first.
The vehicle on the side farther from the mountain should go first.
